footer.desc: A platform showcasing traditional Uzbek craftsmanship to the world. Unique items created by master hands.

home.hero1_sub: Discover the best examples of Uzbek craftsmanship. Each item is a product of manual labor and love.
home.hero2_sub: The art of carpet weaving passed down from generation to generation. Each carpet has its own story.
home.hero3_sub: Unique jewelry created by master hands continuing millennial jewelry traditions.
home.feat1_desc: Every product is created by a checked and certified craftsman.
home.feat2_desc: We deliver across Uzbekistan within 1-3 days.
home.feat3_desc: Payme, Click, Uzcard, Humo, and other payment methods.
home.feat4_desc: We are ready to answer your questions at any time.
home.cat_desc: Discover the multifaceted world of traditional Uzbek craftsmanship
home.feat_prod_desc: The most popular and highly rated items on our platform
home.crafts_desc: The most talented and experienced masters of our platform
home.cta_desc: Present your items to millions of buyers. Registration is free!

about.desc: A platform that presents Uzbekistan's rich craftsmanship heritage to the world through modern technologies
about.mission_title: Showcasing Uzbek Craftsmanship to the World
about.mission_p1: Founded in 2020, E-Hunarmand is a platform that directly connects skilled craftsmen from all corners of Uzbekistan with buyers.
about.mission_p2: We value the unique skill of each craftsman and created a digital environment to preserve and develop their art. Through the platform, the buyer purchases real, handmade products directly from the master — without intermediaries.
about.val1_desc: Every product is handmade by a real craftsman and quality checked.
about.val2_desc: We strive to pass on centuries-old craftsmanship to future generations.
about.val3_desc: We ensure a fair income for craftsmen through direct sales.
about.val4_desc: We work towards bringing Uzbek craftsmanship to world markets.
